This hunk is not part of the Schnorr-48 wire migration and currently has no issue owner.","design":"Keep this as a one-file hardening slice rather than coupling it to link wire-format recovery.","acceptance_criteria":"Clock acquisition failure returns a deterministic error without consuming or corrupting queued frames; success behavior remains unchanged; a host fault-injection test covers the failure; sanitizer-compatible C tests and three independent reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:28:44.436729Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T06:42:19.471314Z","started_at":"2026-07-18T06:42:19.471314Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-18T06:47:19.471314Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-18T06:42:19.471314Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.62","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:28:44.573524Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Implemented fallible POSIX/Zephyr time acquisition returning -EIO before lock or mutation; default-deadline push validates first and uses one timestamp; uint32 wrap arithmetic is defined and half-range constraint documented. Host fault injection traverses platform helper and verifies queue count, full stats, output length/bytes, queued payload, invalid-argument precedence, and recovery. Plain and UBSan -Werror builds pass 18/18; AppleClang ASan hangs before main. Three direct hash-bound reviews found no in-scope blockers. Existing read concurrency/mutex lifecycle tracked as project-LICHEN-5ku5."}
C TX queue clock failures now fail closed without mutation
